page: Microsoft Azure F64als_v6 is a compute-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Falsv6 server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor with 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.7 GHz. The system features 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. This configuration operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and utilizes the x86_64 architecture. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, though it is capable of utilizing Premium Storage.

In benchmark evaluations, the F64als_v6 demonstrates top-tier CPU capabilities, placing in the top 10% for both single-core and multi-core stress-ng performance. Its memory subsystem achieves top-tier read-only small block cached bandwidth at 9259.13 GB/sec, alongside strong uncached large-block read and write speeds. The processor's architectural extensions, including AVX-512 vector and cryptography instructions, support high-throughput operations, as evidenced by top-tier results in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, Geekbench ray tracing, and software compilation.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the server's low memory-to-core ratio offers a resource-dense configuration for compute-bound tasks without the overhead of unutilized RAM. This makes it highly efficient for workloads that demand raw CPU throughput rather than large memory footprints. Appropriate workloads include software compilation, ray tracing, image processing, static web serving, and medium-scale LLM inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure F64als_v6 is a compute-optimized virtual machine from the Falsv6 family, featuring 64 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz. Operating on the x86_64 architecture via Microsoft Hyper-V, it provides 128.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a low memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. The server lacks local storage and GPUs but supports Premium Storage. Benchmarks place its single-core and multi-core CPU performance in the top 10%, with strong memory bandwidth and top-tier software compilation speeds. This resource density makes the F64als_v6 highly cost-efficient for compute-heavy, memory-lean workloads. It is optimized for tasks such as software compilation, ray tracing, image processing, and medium-scale language model inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F64als_v6 is a compute-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC cores at 3.7 GHz and 128 GB of RAM, delivering top-tier CPU performance for compute-heavy workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure F64als_v6 is a compute-optimized server with 64 AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and top-tier CPU benchmark performance.
tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core AMD EPYC compute-optimized platform designed for high-throughput processing and resource-dense execution without memory overhead.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 physical cores running at 3.7 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core
Top-tier CPU performance in stress-ng and Geekbench benchmarks
No local storage or GPU, with support for Premium Storage
Suited for software compilation, ray tracing, and LLM inference
